interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory for Codex CLI work.
interface.longDescription: codex-mem captures Codex CLI session activity, stores reusable observations, and injects relevant context back into future Codex sessions.
defaultPrompt: Find what I already learned about this codebase before I start a new task.
Search previous Codex sessions for work related to the file I am editing.
Summarize the last Codex session and inject the most relevant context into this one.
